water.name: Sonoma Creek and tributaries (waterfall to Highway 121 bridge)

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(106) — Sonoma Creek and tributaries (Sonoma Co.)
sources.quotedText: (106) Sonoma Creek and tributaries (Sonoma Co.). Sonoma Creek and tributaries between the Sonoma Creek seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park (located 0.2 miles upstream of the west end of the Canyon Trail) and the Highway 121 bridge. Note: Sonoma Creek below the Highway 121 bridge is tidewater, and is under regulations for the Ocean and San Francisco Bay District (see Sections 1.53 and 27.00). Closed to all fishing year.

sources.title: Sugarloaf Ridge State Park | California State Parks
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 234882, "Sonoma Creek", Stream, CA, Sonoma Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":234882,"gaz_name":"Sonoma Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Sonoma"} — geometry is a 5-point multipoint tracing the creek's course; the third vertex (Web Mercator -13636760.7297, 4625901.1400) converts to lon -122.50111, lat 38.32825, which falls within this file's waterfall-to-Highway-121-bridge reach and is used as the representative coordinate, replacing the file's prior coordinate (-122.478, 38.332), which was about 2.0 km away. The second vertex (-122.45194, 38.24992) sits ~0.5 km from the CA Water Boards' 'Sonoma Creek at Hwy 121 bridge' water-quality monitoring site (CEDEN-206SON010, 38.2405, -122.4510), corroborating the digitized course near this reach's downstream boundary; the fourth vertex (-122.50111, 38.43714) sits near Sugarloaf Ridge State Park, corroborating the upstream (waterfall) boundary shared with the sibling 'Sonoma Creek and tributaries' (above waterfall) entry.

parameters.note: Sonoma Creek and tributaries between the Sonoma Creek seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park (0.2 miles upstream of the west end of the Canyon Trail) and the Highway 121 bridge are closed to all fishing year-round. Sonoma Creek below the Highway 121 bridge is tidewater and is governed instead by the Ocean and San Francisco Bay District rules (14 CCR §§1.53, 27.00). Sonoma Creek above the waterfall is a separately regulated catch-and-release reach under 14 CCR §7.50(b)(141).

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing year-round between the Sugarloaf Ridge State Park seasonal waterfall and the Highway 121 bridge

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This reach is closed to all fishing year-round, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
